h(t).description: The failure rate (hazard function) for the hydraulic component, given as h(t) = t/(t+1) for t > 0, used to derive the reliability function R(t).

t.description: Time variable in years, the independent variable over which the failure rate is defined and the reliability function is computed.

R(t).description: The reliability function to be determined, representing the probability that the component survives beyond time t.
